description_wiki: Mexico, officially the United Mexican States, is a country in North America.

description: asymmetric war between the Mexican Government and various drug trafficking syndicates
description_wiki: The Mexican drug war is an ongoing asymmetric armed conflict between the Mexican government and various drug trafficking syndicates.
